sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7584" key="a)nasfhno/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνασφηνόω</orth>, <sense id="n7584.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tighten with wedges,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:159:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">159.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
